$schema: Commit tracker for DassianInc/dassian-adt — grouped by sprint, auto-triaged

commits.message: feat: MCP OAuth 2.0 per-user SAP authentication
commits.relevance: Self-hosted OAuth AS with PKCE. In-memory token store (no persistence). ARC-1 uses BTP-external auth (XSUAA/OIDC/Destination Service) — different architecture. Dassian's simpler for on-premise but lacks token refresh, revocation, audit logging.

commits.message: feat: read PORT env var for Azure App Service compatibility
feat: Multi-system support via SAP UI Landscape XML auto-discovery
commits.relevance: Map<string, SystemEntry> + sap_system_id injected into all tool schemas. Reads SAPUILandscapeGlobal.xml. ARC-1 uses one-instance-per-system model with BTP Destination Service. Pragmatic for on-premise multi-system. Not planned for ARC-1 (P3: OPS-03).

commits.message: feat: OAuth/XSUAA support via service key or individual env vars
commits.relevance: Closed XSUAA auth gap vs ARC-1. Still lacks BTP Destination Service + Principal Propagation. ARC-1 leads in BTP-native auth.

commits.message: feat: add 16 new tools (traces, DDIC, pretty print, revisions, inactive objects, annotation defs, transport admin, test include, RAP binding)
commits.relevance: Full TraceHandlers.ts (8 tools: list/params/config/hit-list/statements/db-access/delete/delete-config), TestHandlers.ts (abap_create_test_include + abap_unit_test), DdicHandlers.ts (ddic_element + ddic_references), RapHandlers.ts, SourceHandlers additions (pretty_print, revisions). Fix proposals + unit tests are most impactful. ARC-1 already has most of these.

commits.message: feat: GitHub Pages documentation for all 53 tools
feat: transport improvements (TOC classification, auto-classify tasks, task number resolution)
commits.relevance: Transport task/request classification: reclassify after create instead of wrong OPERATION type for TOC entries. Verify ARC-1 transport.ts TOC handling.

commits.message: fix: multiple lock/session fixes (dead-session cycle, 400 detection, session-sticky lock/write/unlock)
commits.relevance: abap-adt-api library session management fragile. ARC-1's withStatefulSession() is architecturally superior — already avoids these issues.

commits.message: fix(data): skip decodeQueryResult crash on null DATE columns
commits.relevance: Verify ARC-1 RunQuery handles null DATE columns in query results (src/adt/client.ts RunQuery path).
Class include writes must share stateful session (LOCK in same session as PUT). Verify ARC-1 crud.ts class include write paths use withStatefulSession().

commits.message: feat: BDEF creation + STRU type support + abap_edit_method + compact mode toggle
commits.relevance: BDEF create: ARC-1 has. Edit method: ARC-1 has method surgery (SAPWrite edit_method). STRU: ARC-1 has. Compact mode: ARC-1 has hyperfocused mode.

commits.message: feat: MCP quality-of-life: elicitation recovery, batch activation, ATC variant fallback
Initial commit (v2.0 rewrite from mario-andreschak fork)
commits.relevance: Foundation commit: 25 tools, stdio+HTTP, abap-adt-api library, MCP elicitation. Elicitation patterns reviewed — ARC-1 now has comprehensive elicitation.

notes: No public issues filed on DassianInc/dassian-adt as of 2026-04-16 — feedback via GitHub Discussions or private channels
abap-mcpb (albanleong) is a frozen snapshot of dassian-adt v2.0 — 1 commit, 0 stars, not maintained
Key abap-adt-api library workarounds: batch activation (bypass array form), error classification (avoid SM12 misclassification), class includes (/source/main suffix bug), 5xx body surfacing
